name: Integer Overflow
description: Detects arithmetic operations on integers that can silently overflow or underflow, leading to wrong calculations, security bypasses, or buffer over-reads.

examples.before:
int total = price * quantity;
// If price=2_000_000 and quantity=2_000, total silently wraps to a negative value
examples.after:
long total = Math.multiplyExact((long) price, (long) quantity);
// multiplyExact throws ArithmeticException on overflow instead of wrapping silently
